morningReport.summary: Overnight, the daemon fleet ran on schedule — consolidation, simulation, Nel QA, Dex integrity, Aether metrics, and Cipher scans all fired. Same core issues persist: no newsletter for 3 days, API 401 on 28th consecutive run, 4 data files with no rendering code. Nel health dropped to 65. System monitors well but cannot remediate from Cowork sandbox. Interactive Mini session needed.
topIssues: API health endpoint failing — 28 consecutive sentinel runs (P0 ESCALATION)
No newsletter for 3 consecutive days (04-12, 04-13, 04-14) — Aurora sandbox-blocked
4 data files have no rendering code in hq.html — invisible to users
Dex recurrent patterns inflating to 120+ — dedup broken
Nel health score 65 — below 70 target, regression from 85
